text:
.globl _start
_start:
    li a0, 1
    li a1, 2
    add a2, a0, a1
    ret

.globl factorial
factorial:
    addi sp, sp, -8
    sw ra, 4(sp)
    sw s0, 0(sp)
    mv s0, a0
    li a1, 1
    ble a0, a1, .Lbase
    addi a0, a0, -1
    call factorial
    mul a0, a0, s0
    j .Ldone
.Lbase:
    li a0, 1
.Ldone:
    lw ra, 4(sp)
    lw s0, 0(sp)
    addi sp, sp, 8
    ret

<fim_prefix>.globl max
max:
    bge a0, a1, .Lret_a0
<fim_suffix>
.Lret_a0:
    ret<fim_middle>    mv a0, a1
    ret

<fim_prefix>.globl fibonacci
fibonacci:
    li t0, 0
    li t1, 1
<fim_suffix>    mv a0, t0
    ret<fim_middle>    beqz a0, .Ldone
.Lloop:
    add t2, t0, t1
    mv t0, t1
    mv t1, t2
    addi a0, a0, -1
    bnez a0, .Lloop
.Ldone:

<block_prefix>.globl sum_array
sum_array:
    li t0, 0
.Lloop:

<task>Generate function body for: .globl abs_val
abs_val takes a0=signed int, returns a0=|a0|</task><asm>.globl abs_val
abs_val:
    bgez a0, .Lpos
    neg a0, a0
.Lpos:
    ret<eof_func>

.globl memcpy_simple
memcpy_simple:
    addi sp, sp, -16
    sw ra, 12(sp)
    sw s0, 8(sp)
    sw s1, 4(sp)
    sw s2, 0(sp)
    mv s0, a0
    mv s1, a1
    mv s2, a2
.Lcopy_loop:
    beqz s2, .Lcopy_done
    lb t0, 0(s1)
    sb t0, 0(s0)
    addi s0, s0, 1
    addi s1, s1, 1
    addi s2, s2, -1
    j .Lcopy_loop
.Lcopy_done:
    lw ra, 12(sp)
    lw s0, 8(sp)
    lw s1, 4(sp)
    lw s2, 0(sp)
    addi sp, sp, 16
    ret

.globl is_even
is_even:
    andi a0, a0, 1
    seqz a0, a0
    ret

<fim_prefix>.globl swap
swap:
<fim_suffix>    sw t1, 0(a0)
    sw t0, 0(a1)
    ret<fim_middle>    lw t0, 0(a0)
    lw t1, 0(a1)

<block_prefix>.globl strlen
strlen:
    li t0, 0
.Lstr_loop:
    lb t1, 0(a0)

.globl multiply
multiply:
    mul a0, a0, a1
    ret

<task>Generate function body for: .globl clamp
clamp takes a0=value, a1=min, a2=max, returns a0=clamped value</task><asm>.globl clamp
clamp:
    blt a0, a1, .Luse_min
    bgt a0, a2, .Luse_max
    ret
.Luse_min:
    mv a0, a1
    ret
.Luse_max:
    mv a0, a2
    ret<eof_func>

.globl clear_array
clear_array:
    beqz a1, .Lclear_done
.Lclear_loop:
    sw zero, 0(a0)
    addi a0, a0, 4
    addi a1, a1, -1
    bnez a1, .Lclear_loop
.Lclear_done:
    ret

<fim_prefix>.globl min3
min3:
    bge a0, a1, .Lcheck_b
<fim_suffix>    ret
.Lcheck_b:
    bge a1, a2, .Lret_c
    mv a0, a1
    ret
.Lret_c:
    mv a0, a2
    ret<fim_middle>    bge a0, a2, .Lret_c2
    ret
.Lret_c2:
    mv a0, a2

.globl power_of_two
power_of_two:
    li t0, 1
    beqz a0, .Lpow_done
.Lpow_loop:
    slli t0, t0, 1
    addi a0, a0, -1
    bnez a0, .Lpow_loop
.Lpow_done:
    mv a0, t0
    ret

<block_prefix>.globl dotprod
dotprod:
    li t0, 0
.Ldot_loop:
    beqz a2, .Ldot_done
    lw t1, 0(a0)

<task>Generate function body for: .globl sign
sign takes a0=int, returns a0=-1 if negative, 0 if zero, 1 if positive</task><asm>.globl sign
sign:
    beqz a0, .Lzero
    bltz a0, .Lneg
    li a0, 1
    ret
.Lneg:
    li a0, -1
    ret
.Lzero:
    ret<eof_func>

.globl div_by_shift
div_by_shift:
    srai a0, a0, a1
    ret

<fim_prefix>.globl reverse_word
reverse_word:
    li t0, 0
    li t1, 32
.Lrev_loop:
<fim_suffix>
    bnez t1, .Lrev_loop
    mv a0, t0
    ret<fim_middle>    slli t0, t0, 1
    andi t2, a0, 1
    or t0, t0, t2
    srli a0, a0, 1
    addi t1, t1, -1

.globl load_byte_arr
load_byte_arr:
    addi sp, sp, -4
    sw ra, 0(sp)
    lb a0, 0(a0)
    lw ra, 0(sp)
    addi sp, sp, 4
    ret
